message:
refactor(runtime): expand table abstractions with iterator and accessor methods

Enhance runtime table wrappers with additional functionality:

obligation_table.rs, region_table.rs, task_table.rs (+10 lines each):
- Add new accessor methods for table operations
- Improve API consistency across all table types

state.rs (major refactor):
- Update RuntimeState to use new table accessor methods
- Simplify internal state management
- Reduce direct arena access in favor of table abstractions

scheduler/three_lane.rs:
- Update scheduler to use new table APIs
- Improve task queue management

This continues the sharding refactor by further encapsulating
arena operations behind type-safe table interfaces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
